resources.string: Failed to determine the file to load
Shared as read-only by the source app. Use \"Edit a copy\" to make changes.
Preparing for the first start after an update.
If you like it, please give us 5 stars in Google Play. Your good reviews are our best motivation.
This file cannot be saved in this location, opening it read-only. Move it to the Play files for full read/write access.
This document is read-only. Do you want to make a copy for editing?
This document may contain formatting or content that cannot be saved in the currently selected file format \"Text\".
